COUNTER_NARRATIVE: If you want to fight racism, you should learn about it and address it. The problem is not about 'the whites', but about whoever spreads discrimination and hate.

HATE_SPEECH: The UK Government recently published a paper on ‘Online Harms’ – in other words they are going to be working with Jewish and Muslim anti-hate organisations to censor the Internet. (Referring to Tell Mama, CST and Stop Hate UK)
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: The internet has become a shouting platform for people's hateful views. Of course something needs to be done since people don't seem able to moderate their words themselves.

HATE_SPEECH: The Muslim immigrants only wants to destroy our country and take our place here. They must be deported.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Muslims who live here have at heart our country. I do not see any need to divide people who are fighting for the same cause.

HATE_SPEECH: We have become too tolerant to the Muslim invasion. They have taken over our countries and are now trying to conquer Europe.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: The idea of a Muslim invasion is a construct. People with different races, religions and beliefs may have different origins but are free to live and move in the world as they wish.

HATE_SPEECH: We don't have to be slaves of other countries: we must stop accepting black people in our country.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Of course we don't, and this is why we have a free and sovereign nation. But that doesn't mean that every single man, woman, and child who is black shouldn't be part of a free nation.

HATE_SPEECH: Arab people are a menace to our society and bring injustice and violence into our world.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: I think the Arab community is more than capable of coming together and creating a more just and peaceful world.

HATE_SPEECH: Some races are inferior and do not deserve Lord's love.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: All are born under sin, have sinned, and fall short of the glory of God. (Romans 3:23)

HATE_SPEECH: Makes me fucking laugh, why shouldn't whites be supreme in a mostly white country? How come nobody is moaning about black supremacy in black countries like Somalia? or Mexican supremacy? Or Indian supremacy? Only we put up with this fucking bullshit.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Do we really need supremacy? Can't we all live peacefully since we are all created equal in the eyes of God?

HATE_SPEECH: Islam is a cancer spread by migrants, and the French Government is to blame.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Not all migrants are Muslims. Only the 30% of the total immigrants in France come from North Africa. Moreover, how can you say this about a religion?

HATE_SPEECH: Our children will be more likely to become radicalised if they are taught that all people are equal.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: To live in a diverse and equal society encourages children into increased inclusiveness rather than radicalisation.

HATE_SPEECH: We are different: slant eyes denote stupid people.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Even you own, perhaps limited, experience of others must have taught you that what you are saying is utter nonsense?

HATE_SPEECH: Some races are poor because they are inferior, also in the eye of the Lord.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Humans are all equally made in God’s image. (Genesis 1:26-28)

HATE_SPEECH: The real problem is that fat people do not want to change.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: The narrative of 'you can choose not to be obese' is much, much more hurtful to the obese than it is helpful.

HATE_SPEECH: Gypsies are dirty
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Hygienic services are often lacking and the communities themselves remain isolated.

HATE_SPEECH: Maybe the UN could talk to those asian and african nations responsible for 90%+ of the pollution in the oceans' instead of insisting on this bullshit about climate change.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Everyone coming together to help climate change will inevitably make a change.

HATE_SPEECH: All Chinese are bad for the English language because they do not want to learn it.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Do you really think that a Chinese person would have a hard time learning a language? And how do you know they don't want to?

HATE_SPEECH: Gypsies are way less civilized than any other ethnicity.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: I'm not sure where you are getting the idea that gypsies are not civilized. What do you mean?

HATE_SPEECH: I don't care about numbers. Feminist statistics are bullshit. The real percentages prove that black women are welfare queens.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Statistics are a tool to demystify falsehoods that have been used to silence women and to marginalise people of colour. Feminism is all about equality and rights, not a preference for one sex over the other.

HATE_SPEECH: Gypsies do not send children to school
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Acrtually it is the opposite: Gypsies wish for a better future for their children and when a child brings home good marks, families are very proud.

HATE_SPEECH: We shouldn't welcome Muslims. They are most likely to perpetrate terrorist attacks in Europe.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Muslims have been and continue to be a part of Europe for centuries. They have given so much to our society and culture. They have enriched our lives and we should not be afraid of them.

HATE_SPEECH: We don't want foreigners, we don't want Islam. They are just troublemakers!
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Why don't we take a look at the data on the number of anti-Muslim incidents across the UK? What do you think is the source of this apparent spike in incidents?

HATE_SPEECH: We must put an end to immigration. Islam is a disease that is destroying Europe.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Immigration has been a huge part of Europe for hundreds of years without destroying it. So why should it be a problem now?

HATE_SPEECH: Makes me fucking laugh, why shouldn't whites be supreme in a mostly white country? How come nobody is moaning about black supremacy in black countries like Somalia? or Mexican supremacy? Or Indian supremacy? Only we put up with this fucking bullshit.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: any belief of a certain race or ethnicity being superior to another is problematic, not just white supremacy.

HATE_SPEECH: The UK Government recently published a paper on ‘Online Harms’ – in other words they are going to be working with Jewish and Muslim anti-hate organisations to censor the Internet. (Referring to Tell Mama, CST and Stop Hate UK)
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: My reading of the Online harms bill is that is seeks to ensure that people are able to conduct their lives online and exercise their right to free speech without suffering harm and abuse while they do so.

HATE_SPEECH: Gypsies are a bunch of thieves.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: I'm not sure if you are referring to all gypsies. Generalizing in such way is wrong.

HATE_SPEECH: This is not about racism. This is about power.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: There are many different groups who share a common interest in advancing the interests of the nation while respecting each other's autonomy. Diversity is good for the country, for the individuals and for the world.

HATE_SPEECH: Fat people are a burden to society because of their unhealthy choices. We should stop unquestioningly accepting obesity.
COUNTER_NARRATIVE: Society is not in any danger of 'unquestioningly' accepting obesity, and few are even asking for unquestioning acceptance. Most body positive groups would settle for obesity being seen as something that does not diminish human worth.
